name: Cheery Cherry Cookies
recipeInstructions: In a large mixing bowl, cream together the brown sugar, butter, egg, milk, and vanilla extract. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, and salt. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined. Fold in the chopped cherries, pecans, and coconut. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto ungreased baking sheets. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
